rationale: Both papers are centrally about dynamic bidding behavior in online auctions: the citing study models bid-level supplier behavior in reverse procurement auctions, while the cited paper provides a formal forward-looking bidding model and empirical bid-level evidence in sequential eBay auctions. Given the citing paper’s stated aim to extend prior auction research on bidding dynamics, this citation is plausibly a theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention, so it merits second-stage review.
